url: Konkani Alphabets – Devanagari Alphabets

rows: Practice the vowel अ — it sounds like 'a' in 'about'.
The consonant क is a guttural 'ka'.
Write ख and say it clearly: 'kha'.
Nasal अं needs a soft nose sound.
Combine क + अ to read क.
Read slowly: क ख ग घ.
हळू वाच: क ख ग घ
Halu vaach: k kha ga gha
Retroflex ट is made with the tongue curled back.
Do not mix ट and त — listen carefully.
The letter र changes shape in clusters.
ह at the end of a cluster is soft.
Stress usually falls on the last syllable.
